---
title: error-naming
description: "Name package errors with an Err prefix."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Name package errors with an Err prefix. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
var NotFoundError = errors.New("not found")
```

## Good

```go
var ErrNotFound = errors.New("not found")
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only error-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
